description: Partnered with leading tech organizations, including Microsoft, Neat, and Google, to deliver tailored Digital Signage product features and innovative solutions that meet client requirements.
Implemented PWA service worker for asset cache and file caching for millions of cost saving.
Collaborated with Development Leads and Scum team to estimate effort and scope for assigned tasks, ensuring efficient resource planning.
Applied best practices for the full software development life cycle (SDLC) in ReactJS web and mobile development, collaborating with product and QA teams in Agile project management.
Translated UI/UX wireframes into high-quality, custom web and mobile components, delivering clean, readable, and maintainable code that meets requirements and quality standards.
Actively contributed to process improvement initiatives and team performance through code reviews and CI/CD pipeline deployments, enhancing operational efficiency and delivery speed.
Developed and maintained ASP.NET C# applications, including web projects, Windows Forms applications, and tools for finance and HR products.
Designed and enhanced web user interfaces to improve usability and user experience.
Collaborated with stakeholders to align project goals and ensured timely delivery of high-quality solutions.
Developed and maintained applications using React, React Native, and the Ionic framework, delivering cross-platform solutions.
Conducted research on emerging technologies and frameworks to drive product innovation and improvement.
